questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to IP Subnetting?
options: Inefficient scaling of Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR) subnet masks calculations.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR) subnet masks calculations.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR) subnet masks calculations scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
